race.comment: DO WHAT I SAY (9) made it three runner-up cheques on the trot when she finished well but missed by under a length over 1200m here a fortnight ago. Coming back to 1100m is a small query but she is going better than most of these and can finish right over the top. CHARLOTTE'S HERE (5) returned to form last time out with a close second against the fillies and mares over this course and distance. Nicely drawn and drops 3.5kgs after the claim. Has been up for a while but holds her form and looks a definite threat. DECADAD (2) stalked the pace but had no answer to the winner over 1200m at Murwillumbah recently. Going well enough to test this field. Last start Gatton maiden winner YOWERI (1) is a lightly raced three-year-old with improvement to come. MISS ZERMATT (4) resumes. Has won three from four when fresh which is a compelling stat.
